description: Dry-run config template for Marmousi multi-scale FWI experiments.

placeholders.name: start_frequency_hz
placeholders.description: Lowest inversion frequency used to reduce cycle skipping risk.

placeholders.name: max_frequency_hz
placeholders.description: Highest frequency included in the current multi-scale band.

placeholders.name: iteration_count
placeholders.description: Maximum inversion iterations for the dry-run preview.
